response.justification: Bogdan is currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq—directly aligned with the role's core focus on agentic systems and production deployments. However, he falls short of the minimum 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions; his AI work spans approximately 13 months (April 2025 onward). While he brings 10+ years of solid software engineering, staff-level experience, and strong TypeScript capabilities, critical gaps include no Python background (unusual for GenAI), no demonstrated expertise in vector databases or RAG systems, and limited cloud platform depth. An interview should clarify whether prior AI/ML work exists but wasn't highlighted.
strengths: Currently shipping AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq—directly aligned with role's agentic workflow focus
10+ years production software experience at staff level with proven technical leadership and mentoring capabilities
Strong TypeScript/full-stack engineering foundation for designing system integrations and complex infrastructure
concerns: Does not meet 8+ years AI requirement; approximately 13 months of AI work since April 2025
No Python background listed despite being primary GenAI language; missing vector database, RAG, and LLM expertise
Limited cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK; insufficient evidence of architectural work on major cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI experience (1.3 yr vs 8+ required)
Current role directly relevant to job
Missing Python and specialized AI tools
